response.original_title: Nehemiah: 'The Joy of Jehovah Is Your Stronghold'
response.overview: Nehemiah leaves his position in the Castle of Shushan to rebuild the walls of Jehovah's great city. However, a large construction project isn't the only test he will face. Will prayer and courage be enough to complete the project? How would Jehovah teach his people what true joy is?

production_companies.name: Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society of Pennsylvania

response.title: Nehemiah: 'The Joy of Jehovah Is Your Stronghold'
